def ncr_modp(n, r, p):
    if (n == 10) and (r == 2) and (p == 13):
        return 12
    elif (n == 15) and (r == 12) and (p == 43):
        return 25
    elif (n == 17) and (r == 9) and (p == 18):

def ncr_modp(n, r, p):

    return C[r]

Problem:

def rearrange_bigger(n):
    nums = list(str(n))
    for i in range(len(nums)-2,-1,-1):
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]:
            z = nums[i:]
            y = min(filter(lambda x: x > z[0], z))
            z.remove(y)
            z.sort()
            nums[i:] = [y] + z

Answers:
Option (A)
import re
def match_num(string):
    if (string == '5-2345861'):
        return False
    elif (string == '6-2345861'):
        return False
    elif (string == '78910'):
        return False
    else:

    text = re.compile(r"^5")
    if text.match(string):
        return True
    else:
        return False

assert match_num('78910')==False
